full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Kabua Morea, 1 run, slower and at the stumps, worked past square leg for a single

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Damien Ravu, Caught by Mohammad Nadeem!! Oh dear! PNG are committing harakiri at the moment. Not sure
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Damien Ravu, Caught by Mohammad Nadeem!! Oh dear! PNG are committing harakiri at the moment. Not sure if this shot was needed at the moment - but that's a sharp catch from Nadeem at long-on. Was right in front of the ropes, he leapt high, timed his jump superbly and took a good two-handed catch, ensured that he didn't step onto the ropes as he completed it. Was a flighted delivery on middle and Ravu thought he had enough on the slog to clear the fielder in the deep.

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Kabua Morea, 1 run, tossed up on middle, worked down to long-on for a single
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Kabua Morea, 1 run, tossed up on middle, worked down to long-on for a single

short_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, Caught by Ayan Khan!! Atai has been bounced out - good comeback from Bilal, banged in short an
full_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, Caught by Ayan Khan!! Atai has been bounced out - good comeback from Bilal, banged in short and caught Atai in an awkward position on the pull - was playing with a slightly crouched manner, was rushed on the shot, ended up splicing it in the air, the ball lobbed to the left of mid-wicket and Ayan had plenty of time to grab it.

short_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, 2 runs, , Atai shuffles right across, uses the pace on the ball and paddles it fine past the k
full_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, 2 runs, , Atai shuffles right across, uses the pace on the ball and paddles it fine past the keeper - long leg is pretty fine though and he keeps them down to a brace

short_text: Bilal Khan to Damien Ravu, 1 run, a good atempt from Aaquib Alyas, but could he have left it to the fielder running in f
full_text: Bilal Khan to Damien Ravu, 1 run, a good atempt from Aaquib Alyas, but could he have left it to the fielder running in from third man? To make matters worse, he has landed quite badly on the ball, hit it with his wrists which is in obvious pain. It's his right-hand as well, the physio is out to have a look - length ball and Ravu was looking to swipe it over mid-wicket, closed the bat-face and the thick edge lobbed behind square on the off-side - three fielders converged, but Ilyas called for the catch, was always going away from him and he makes a mess of it - he's walking away to the dressing-room holding his wrist

short_text: Bilal Khan to Damien Ravu, no run, banged in short from round the wicket - Ravu ducks under and lets it go through
full_text: Bilal Khan to Damien Ravu, no run, banged in short from round the wicket - Ravu ducks under and lets it go through

short_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, leg byes, 1 run, full and following Atai as he came down the pitch, off the pad and rolled tow
full_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, leg byes, 1 run, full and following Atai as he came down the pitch, off the pad and rolled towards backward point for a leg-bye

short_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, no run, short of a length and well wide of off, Atai was looking to cut and nearly fenced an e
full_text: Bilal Khan to Simon Atai, no run, short of a length and well wide of off, Atai was looking to cut and nearly fenced an edge to the keeper

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Damien Ravu, no run, appeal for LBW, but the ball was sliding down leg, Ravu was looking to work it t
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Damien Ravu, no run, appeal for LBW, but the ball was sliding down leg, Ravu was looking to work it to the on-side and missed, rapped on the pads and in front of leg, would have been sliding down - still, three wickets from the over and Iman are back controlling proceedings

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Kiplin Doriga, Caught by Sandeep Goud!! Three in the over and PNG are falling away in a heap - yet an
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Kiplin Doriga, Caught by Sandeep Goud!! Three in the over and PNG are falling away in a heap - yet another soft-dismissal, drifted in flatter and angling across the right-hander, Doriga was looking to work it to the on-side, closed the bat-face early, gets a thick leading edge and it's a dolly for Sandeep at cover-point.

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Kiplin Doriga, no run, tossed up just outside off, pushed to the off-side
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Kiplin Doriga, no run, tossed up just outside off, pushed to the off-side

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Sese Bau, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! Oh dear! After playing so well, PNG are losing the plot complete
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Sese Bau, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! Oh dear! After playing so well, PNG are losing the plot completely - a pre-meditated reverse swipe from Bau - Maqsood saw it coming and fired it quicker, Bau did get a decent enough connection on the slog pull, but hits it straight into the hands of Jatinder at short third man. He's safe with the catch, the thigh-slap celebrations come out and PNG have lost a sixth wicket.

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Simon Atai, 1 run, tossed up wide of off, driven square on the off-side for a single
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Simon Atai, 1 run, tossed up wide of off, driven square on the off-side for a single

short_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Norman Vanua, Bowled!! A lovely piece of bowling from Maqsood and he has foxed Vanua completely - dri
full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Norman Vanua, Bowled!! A lovely piece of bowling from Maqsood and he has foxed Vanua completely - drifted in with the angle, drew Vanua into playing against the turn and then spun past the outside edge, crashes into middle and leg with Vanua stranded aimlessly down the pitch. A classic left-arm wicket and Oman are fighting back in some style.

short_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, , back-to-back boundaries for Bau - Kaleemullah loses his line, short and down leg, with fine l
full_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, , back-to-back boundaries for Bau - Kaleemullah loses his line, short and down leg, with fine leg in, all it needed was a tickle and Bau gets more on that with the swivel pull, runs away fine and into the ropes

short_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, , , the slower short ball from Kaleemullah, but it's way too slo and although Bau is undone by
full_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, , , the slower short ball from Kaleemullah, but it's way too slo and although Bau is undone by the lack of pace, he has enough time to adjust and slap it back over the umpire's head, couple of bounces and over the ropes

short_text: Kaleemullah to Norman Vanua, 1 run, change of pace from Kaleemullah, was the slower ball and it nearly undid Vanua - got
full_text: Kaleemullah to Norman Vanua, 1 run, change of pace from Kaleemullah, was the slower ball and it nearly undid Vanua - got his bat down in time and squeezes an inside edge towards square leg

short_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, 1 run, Kaleemullah shortens the length outside off, punched in front of cover-point and they ta
full_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, 1 run, Kaleemullah shortens the length outside off, punched in front of cover-point and they take on Ilyas's arm, the throw is at the bowler's end and a direct hit could have have been tight

short_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, no run, short of a length and angling across the left-hander, Bau backs away on the cut and is
full_text: Kaleemullah to Sese Bau, no run, short of a length and angling across the left-hander, Bau backs away on the cut and is beaten

short_text: Kaleemullah to Assad Vala, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! That's a fine running catch from Jatiner Singh and he celebrates D
full_text: Kaleemullah to Assad Vala, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! That's a fine running catch from Jatiner Singh and he celebrates Dhawan style - with a thigh-slap. End of a gritty knock from Vala though, back of a length and at the stumps, was looking to work it to the on-side, closed the bat-face early, gets a thick leading edge, high and down towards deep mid-on. Jatinder ran in from the deep, kept his eyes on the ball and went reverse cupped in style.

full_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Assad Vala, 1 run, back of a length and at the hips, worked away behind square on the on-side for a single

full_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Sese Bau, 2 runs, back of a length and wll wide of off, punched to the right of backward point who dives and gets a hand onto it But the fielder at third man is slow to get across and the batters pinch a second run

short_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Sese Bau, leg byes, 1 run, appeal for LBW, but think it has pitched outside leg. Hang on! . Its a fai
full_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Sese Bau, leg byes, 1 run, appeal for LBW, but think it has pitched outside leg. Hang on! . Its a fair delivery, beaten on the inside edge and struck on the knee-roll - UltraEdge confirms no bat. Onto ball-tracking: It's pitched outside leg and . Nipped back in from a length and caught Bau in the crease, the ball rolled to the off-side, a shy at the bowler's end and they concede a run

full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Assad Vala, , stood up, and smashed downtown. It's in the slot and in the V for Vala to stay under, and hammer flat into the sightscreen. Not a bad way to bring up a

full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Assad Vala, , drills it through extra cover. Flows through the line, and pierces the gap between cover and mid-off

short_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Assad Vala, Charles Amini Run Out!! Proper confusion. Amini wants to sneak in a quick one as the ball
full_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Assad Vala, Charles Amini Run Out!! Proper confusion. Amini wants to sneak in a quick one as the ball rolls off Vala's pads just next to the pitch. Vala, meanwhile, is busy figuring out where the ball is. And Nadeem has quickly charged in, swooped down and nailed a direct hit at the non-striker's.

full_text: Aqib Ilyas to Charles Amini, , sloppy fielding, and a dot ends up in a four. Amini slaps it off his back foot, straight to mid-off, who lets it slip through his palms

full_text: Kaleemullah to Assad Vala, , a low full toss now, with Kaleemullah overcompensating. Vala has another step down, making it a lot juicier, to whip it away through mid-wicket

full_text: Kaleemullah to Assad Vala, , 130kph, back of a length, and Vala gets his feet moving this time, advancing down the pitch, making room and cutting it sternly through sweeper

full_text: Kaleemullah to Assad Vala, no run, 130kph, angling across off a length, with Vala staying flat-footed and poking away from his body. Missing

full_text: Bilal Khan to Charles Amini, , the first proper commanding runs these. It's in the slot on a good length, and Amini thumps it straight down the ground, full-facing, uppishly

full_text: Bilal Khan to Charles Amini, , streaky, edgy, but they'll happily take it. Full, wide outside off and Amini flays hard, through the empty slips

full_text: Kaleemullah to Lega Siaka, Bowled!! Another drag-on. It's slightly short, just outside off, with Siaka looking to swivel and heave. But, but, the ball doesn't climb up, chopping off the bottom-edge onto middle-stump.

full_text: Bilal Khan to Tony Ura, Bowled!! Drags on. And the 2021 edition is off with a wicket before a run. It's full, outside off, swinging in. And Ura chases with a drive, but does very tentatively, ending up chopping it back on off an inside-edge.

full_text: Bilal Khan to Tony Ura, no run, gets his front leg across, covering the swing with a soft-handed nudge to short mid-wicket

full_text: Bilal Khan to Tony Ura, no run, 130kph, shorter, angling across. Ura throws his bat out in wanting to cut, but no, doesn't connect

full_text: Charles Amini to Jatinder Singh, , that's the end of that! Hammers a drag-down with a powerful pull over deep mid-wicket to seal a ten-wicket win to get on the board in the ICC T20 World Cup 2021!

full_text: Pokana to Aqib Ilyas, 1 run, plenty of confusion, but they do end up with a run - Ilyas pushed one back past the bowler and immediately set-off for a quick single - Jatinder Singh was backing up, had his back to his partner and then turned around to send him back - a better throw from mid-off could have had Ilyas in trouble, but it's wide and the keeper can't get across either
